title: Canadian Steak with Molten Cheese
description: A rich and savory dish featuring steak topped with a molten cheese sauce served with a side of grilled vegetables.

ingredients.name: Canadian Molten Cheese Sauce (1 cup shredded cheddar, 1/2 cup heavy cream, 1 tsp paprika)
Dense Vegetables (such as bell peppers, onion, mushrooms)

instructions: Season steak with grill seasoning and grill for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked to desired level of doneness.
While steak is cooking, melt butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes, or until fragrant.
Stir in Canadian molten cheese sauce and cook until melted and bubbly.
Slice steak into thin strips and serve with molten cheese sauce spooned over the top.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve with grilled vegetables on the side.
